findings.description: PascalCase class names appearing in the s7 code examples are missing from hints: `SystemAccountAuthorityEntity` (used in registerSystemAccountAuthority), `StringUtil` (used in null check condition), `MessageUtil` (used in error handling).
findings.source_evidence: Source code in s7 contains: `new SystemAccountAuthorityEntity()`, `StringUtil.isNullOrEmpty(...)`, `MessageUtil.createMessage(MessageLevel.ERROR, "MSG00001")`

findings.description: PascalCase class names appearing in the s8 code example are missing from hints: `HttpResponse`, `HttpRequest`, `ExecutionContext`, `W11AC02Form`.
findings.source_evidence: Source code in s8 contains: `public HttpResponse doRW11AC0204(HttpRequest req, ExecutionContext ctx)`, `W11AC02Form form = validate(req);`
